__comment: Dev-only deterministic backdrop for the /nerospace capture screenshot harness. A flat, featureless plain so the gallery is shot against an identical ground every run (no seed-dependent terrain or biome tint). Reuses the vanilla overworld dimension type; the harness pins time via gamerule + disables clouds. Surface (smooth_stone) tops out at y=63, so the harness builds/stands at y=64.
